field.label: Enable Module
field.comment: Master switch for all Panth Advanced SEO features.

field.label: Debug Logging
field.comment: Writes detailed SEO processing logs to var/log/panth_seo.log. Disable in production for performance.

field.label: Use Meta Templates
field.comment: Generate meta titles and descriptions from token-based templates when entities lack custom meta values.

field.label: Meta Title Max Length
field.comment: Maximum characters for the meta title tag. Google typically displays 50-60 characters. Recommended: 60.

field.label: Meta Description Max Length
field.comment: Maximum characters for the meta description tag. Google typically displays 150-160 characters. Recommended: 160.

field.label: Append Store Name to Title
field.comment: Appends " - Store Name" to all meta titles for brand consistency.

field.label: Strip Native Title Prefix/Suffix
field.comment: Removes Magento's default title prefix/suffix (configured in Content > Design > HTML Head) to give full control to templates.

field.label: Enable SEO Name Token
field.comment: Enables the {{seo_name}} token in meta templates, which uses the product's dedicated SEO name attribute if available.

field.label: Pagination Label Position
field.comment: Where to place the page number indicator in the meta title: prefix, suffix, or none.

field.label: Pagination Format
field.comment: Use %p as the page number placeholder. Default: | Page %p

field.label: Force Template Over Existing Meta
field.comment: When enabled, meta templates always override manually set meta title/description on products and categories. When disabled (default), entities with existing meta values keep them.

field.label: Emit Canonical Tag
field.comment: Outputs a rel="canonical" link tag on all pages to prevent duplicate content issues.

field.label: Strip Query String
field.comment: Removes all query parameters (e.g. ?p=2, ?product_list_order=name) from canonical URLs.

field.label: Lowercase Host
field.comment: Forces the hostname portion of canonical URLs to lowercase to prevent case-sensitive duplicates.

field.label: Remove Trailing Slash
field.comment: Removes trailing slashes from canonical URLs (except homepage, controlled separately).

field.label: Paginated Pages Canonical to Page 1
field.comment: When enabled, all paginated pages (p=2, p=3, etc.) point their canonical to page 1. When disabled (recommended), each page self-canonicalizes.

field.label: Associated Product Canonical to Parent
field.comment: Simple products used in configurables/grouped/bundles will point their canonical to the parent product URL.

field.label: Ignore Pages (one URL path per line)
field.comment: Pages matching these paths will not emit a canonical tag.

field.label: Disable Canonical for NOINDEX Pages
field.comment: Suppresses the canonical tag on pages marked as noindex, since search engines should not index them anyway.

field.label: Product Canonical URL Type
field.comment: Controls how product canonical URLs are built: without any category path, with the shortest category path, or with the longest/deepest category path.

field.label: Use Short Category URL for Canonical
field.comment: When enabled, uses the shortest (shallowest) URL path for category canonical URLs instead of the full nested path.

field.label: Trailing Slash on Homepage
field.comment: Controls trailing slash behavior for the homepage canonical URL, independent of the general "Remove Trailing Slash" setting.

field.label: Strip Query Parameters
field.comment: Comma-separated list of query parameter names to strip from canonical URLs (e.g. utm_source,utm_medium,gclid,fbclid). These are removed in addition to the "Strip Query String" option which removes all parameters.

field.label: Auto-Generate URL Key on Product Creation
field.comment: When enabled, new products without a manually entered URL key receive one generated from the template below.

field.label: URL Key Template
field.comment: Tokens: {{name}}, {{sku}}, {{attribute:code}}. Filters: |truncate:N, |lower. Example: {{name}}-{{sku}}

field.label: Also Apply to Existing Products on Save
field.comment: When enabled, the URL key template is re-applied every time an existing product is saved (overwriting any previous key).

field.label: Enable Crawl Audit
field.comment: Enables periodic site crawl audits that check for broken links, missing meta tags, and redirect chains. Resource intensive on large catalogs.

field.label: Crawl Depth (max pages)
field.comment: Maximum number of pages to crawl per audit run. Default: 100.

field.label: Enable SEO Toolbar
field.comment: Shows an on-page SEO diagnostics toolbar on the storefront for allowed IPs.

field.label: SEO Toolbar Allowed IPs
field.comment: Comma-separated IP literals or CIDR ranges (e.g. 10.0.0.5,192.168.0.0/16). When the toolbar fires it disables Full Page Cache for that response, so the allow-list MUST be tight in production. Leave empty to render the toolbar only in MAGE_MODE=developer. Use * as a single entry to explicitly allow every visitor (this WILL disable FPC site-wide; only use on staging).

group.label: Google Merchant Feed
group.comment: Generate a Google Shopping XML product feed for free listings. The feed is served at /seo/feed/google and regenerated daily by cron to pub/media/panth_seo/google_feed_{store_code}.xml. CLI: bin/magento panth:seo:feed.

field.label: Enable Google Merchant Feed
field.comment: When enabled, the Google Shopping XML feed is served at /seo/feed/google and regenerated daily.

field.label: Include Out of Stock Products
field.comment: When enabled, out-of-stock products are included in the feed with availability "out of stock".

field.label: Google Product Category Attribute
field.comment: Product attribute code that holds the Google product category taxonomy value (e.g. google_product_category). Leave empty to omit.

field.label: Shipping Country
field.comment: Two-letter ISO country code, e.g. US, GB, DE. Leave empty to omit the shipping element.

field.label: Shipping Price
field.comment: Flat shipping price (e.g. 5.99). Leave empty to omit the shipping element.

group.label: Google Analytics 4
group.comment: Integrate GA4 measurement and enhanced ecommerce tracking. Outputs the gtag.js snippet and fires view_item, view_item_list, and add_to_cart events.

field.label: Enable GA4
field.comment: Enable Google Analytics 4 script output on the storefront.

field.label: Measurement ID
field.comment: Your GA4 Measurement ID (e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX). Find it in Google Analytics > Admin > Data Streams. Only alphanumerics, dash and underscore are accepted; any other character is rejected both client-side and server-side.

field.label: Enhanced Ecommerce Events
field.comment: When enabled, fires GA4 enhanced ecommerce events (view_item, view_item_list) on product and category pages.

group.label: Google Search Console
group.comment: Search Console site verification and Google Indexing API integration for instant URL submission. Indexing API docs.

field.label: Site Verification Code
field.comment: The content value from the Google HTML tag verification method (e.g. abc123def456). Outputs a <meta name="google-site-verification"> tag.

field.label: Enable Indexing API
field.comment: When enabled, product, category, and CMS page saves automatically submit the changed URL to the Google Indexing API. Rate limited to 200 submissions per day.

field.label: Service Account JSON Key
field.comment: Paste the full JSON contents of your Google Cloud service account key file. The service account must have the Indexing API role. Stored encrypted.

field.label: Async Indexing via Queue
field.comment: Offloads SEO data indexing to the message queue for non-blocking catalog saves. Requires a running consumer.

field.label: Use MView for Incremental Rebuild
field.comment: Uses Magento's materialized view (changelog) system for incremental SEO data rebuilds instead of full reindex.

field.label: Enable Last-Modified HTTP Header
field.comment: Sets Last-Modified and ETag headers on product and category pages using the entity's updated_at timestamp. Enables efficient browser caching and CDN revalidation.

field.label: Enable Speculation Rules API
field.comment: Outputs browser-native Speculation Rules for prefetch/prerender on hover. Supported in Chrome 121+. Prerenders product pages and prefetches category pages. Excludes checkout, customer, wishlist, and cart paths.
